background: Homeworld: Walkriver/Oriah (E434642-8). Niner earned her nickname from obsession with base-9 mathematics and cryptography. Brilliant computer specialist recruited by SolSec after demonstrating exceptional skills in corporate competitive analysis.
education: University graduate with honors in Computer Science and Cybernetics.
terms: Scholar (Scientist): Electronics (computers)-1, Science (cybernetics)-1. Advanced training in specialist field: cryptography. Promoted to rank 1.
Scholar (Scientist): Science (cybernetics)-2, Computer-1. Published groundbreaking paper on bio-silicon interfaces. Promoted to rank 2. Mustering out: gained contact in academic circles.
Scout (Survey): Electronics (computers)-2, Investigate-1. Recruited for intelligence gathering operations. Survey work provided cover for SolSec recruitment.
Merchant (Broker): Broker-1, Admin-1. Corporate cover identity as trade analyst. Actually analyzing encrypted communications for SolSec.

Agent (Intelligence): Deception-0, Investigate-1. Ludmilla Factory Incident: provided encryption analysis that led to raid resulting in 40 civilian casualties. Carries significant guilt. Promoted to rank 1.

Agent (Intelligence): Electronics (computers)-2, Science (cybernetics)-2. Specialized in cyber-warfare and cryptanalysis. Current assignment: Reversed Engineering operation. Promoted to rank 2. Mustering out: TL-13 Computer/4, Secure Comms, 5000cr.
interactions: Expertise: Computer hacking, cryptography, cybernetics analysis, base-9 mathematical systems
Weaknesses: Guilt over Ludmilla casualties, obsessive personality, can become fixated on puzzles to exclusion of mission priorities
